name: atticus-provider-config
description: External AI provider configuration for Atticus - AI Counsel for Startups
author: JDAI Development Team <info@jdai.ca>

scripts.test: npm run validate && npm run check-duplicates
scripts.version-check: node -e "const yaml = require('js-yaml'); const fs = require('fs'); const config = yaml.load(fs.readFileSync('providers.yaml', 'utf8')); console.log('Version:', config.version);"
